ddls:
CREATE TABLE "users" (
  "user_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each user */,
  "username" TEXT /* Username chosen by the user */,
  "email" TEXT /* Email address of the user */,
  "password_hash" TEXT /* Hashed password for secure authentication */,
  "profile_picture" TEXT /* Profile picture URL of the user */,
  "bio" TEXT /* Biography or description provided by the user */,
  "created_at" TEXT /* Timestamp when the user profile was created */,
  "updated_at" TEXT /* Timestamp when the user profile was last updated */,
  "phone_number" TEXT /* Phone number for verification and notifications */,
  "date_of_birth" TEXT /* Date of birth for age verification and personalized content */,
  "location" TEXT /* Location of the user */,
  "is_private_account" INTEGER /* Flag indicating if the account is private */,
  "verified_account" INTEGER /* Flag indicating if the account is verified */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("user_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "followers" (
  "id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each follower relationship */,
  "userID" INTEGER /* ID of the user being followed */,
  "followerID" INTEGER /* ID of the follower user */,
  "created_at" TEXT /* Timestamp of when the follow action occurred */,
  "status" TEXT /* Status of the follow request (e.g., pending, accepted, rejected) */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_followers_userID FOREIGN KEY ("userID") REFERENCES users ("user_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_followers_followerID FOREIGN KEY ("followerID") REFERENCES users ("user_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "posts" (
  "post_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each post */,
  "user_id" INTEGER /* ID of the user who created the post */,
  "content" TEXT /* Text content of the post */,
  "media_url" TEXT /* URL of any media associated with the post (image/video) */,
  "created_at" TEXT /* Timestamp when the post was created */,
  "updated_at" TEXT /* Timestamp when the post was last updated */,
  "privacy_setting" TEXT /* Privacy setting of the post (e.g., public, followers, private) */,
  "location" TEXT /* Location where the post was created */,
  "is_pinned" INTEGER /* Flag indicating if the post is pinned */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("post_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_posts_user_id FOREIGN KEY ("user_id") REFERENCES users ("user_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "likes" (
  "like_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each like event */,
  "post_id" INTEGER /* ID of the post that was liked */,
  "user_id" INTEGER /* ID of the user who liked the post */,
  "created_at" TEXT /* Timestamp of when the like action occurred */,
  "is_active" INTEGER /* Flag indicating if the like is active */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("like_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_likes_user_id FOREIGN KEY ("user_id") REFERENCES users ("user_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_likes_post_id FOREIGN KEY ("post_id") REFERENCES posts ("post_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "comments" (
  "comment_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each comment */,
  "post_id" INTEGER /* ID of the post being commented on */,
  "user_id" INTEGER /* ID of the user who made the comment */,
  "content" TEXT /* Text content of the comment */,
  "created_at" TEXT /* Timestamp when the comment was created */,
  "is_active" INTEGER /* Flag indicating if the comment is active */,
  "parent_comment_id" INTEGER /* ID of the parent comment (for nested comments) */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("comment_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_comments_parent_comment_id FOREIGN KEY ("parent_comment_id") REFERENCES comments ("comment_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_comments_post_id FOREIGN KEY ("post_id") REFERENCES posts ("post_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_comments_user_id FOREIGN KEY ("user_id") REFERENCES users ("user_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "notifications" (
  "notification_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each notification */,
  "user_id" INTEGER /* ID of the user receiving the notification */,
  "type" TEXT /* Type of notification (e.g., like, comment, follow) */,
  "related_id" INTEGER /* ID of the related entity (e.g., post_id or user_id) */,
  "created_at" TEXT /* Timestamp when the notification was created */,
  "is_read" INTEGER /* Flag indicating whether the notification has been read */,
  "type_description" TEXT /* Description of the notification type */,
  "is_deleted" INTEGER /* Flag indicating if the notification is deleted */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("notification_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_notifications_user_id FOREIGN KEY ("user_id") REFERENCES users ("user_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "user_sessions" (
  "session_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each session */,
  "user_id" INTEGER /* ID of the user associated with the session */,
  "session_token" TEXT /* Session token for user authentication */,
  "created_at" TEXT /* Timestamp when the session was created */,
  "expires_at" TEXT /* Timestamp when the session expires */,
  "device_info" TEXT /* Information about the device used for the session */,
  "ip_address" TEXT /* IP address for security and analytics */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("session_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "media" (
  "media_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each media item */,
  "user_id" INTEGER /* ID of the user who uploaded the media */,
  "media_url" TEXT /* URL of the media file */,
  "media_type" TEXT /* Type of media (e.g., image, video) */,
  "created_at" TEXT /* Timestamp when the media was uploaded */,
  "privacy_setting" TEXT /* Privacy setting of the media */,
  "is_deleted" INTEGER /* Flag indicating if the media is deleted */,
  "thumbnail_url" TEXT /* URL of the thumbnail for quick preview */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("media_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_media_user_id FOREIGN KEY ("user_id") REFERENCES users ("user_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "reports" (
  "report_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each report */,
  "reporter_id" INTEGER /* ID of the user who reported the content */,
  "reported_id" INTEGER /* ID of the user or post being reported */,
  "reason" TEXT /* Reason for the report */,
  "status" TEXT /* Status of the report (e.g., pending, reviewed) */,
  "created_at" TEXT /* Timestamp when the report was created */,
  "reviewed_by" INTEGER /* ID of the moderator who reviewed the report */,
  "reviewed_at" TEXT /* Timestamp when the report was reviewed */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("report_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_reports_reporter_id FOREIGN KEY ("reporter_id") REFERENCES users ("user_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_reports_reported_id FOREIGN KEY ("reported_id") REFERENCES users ("user_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_reports_reviewed_by FOREIGN KEY ("reviewed_by") REFERENCES users ("user_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "settings" (
  "setting_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each setting */,
  "user_id" INTEGER /* ID of the user this setting belongs to */,
  "setting_key" TEXT /* Key for the setting (e.g., privacy, notifications) */,
  "setting_value" TEXT /* Value for the setting */,
  "setting_description" TEXT /* Description of the setting */,
  "is_default" INTEGER /* Flag indicating if the setting is the default value */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("setting_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_settings_user_id FOREIGN KEY ("user_id") REFERENCES users ("user_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "tags" (
  "tag_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each tag */,
  "tag_name" TEXT /* Name of the tag */,
  "tag_description" TEXT /* Description of the tag */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("tag_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "post_tags" (
  "post_id" INTEGER /* ID of the post associated with the tag */,
  "tag_id" INTEGER /* ID of the tag associated with the post */,
  "created_at" TEXT /* Timestamp when the tag was associated with the post */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("post_id", "tag_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "user_roles" (
  "role_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each role */,
  "role_name" TEXT /* Name of the role (e.g., user, moderator, admin) */,
  "role_description" TEXT /* Description of the role */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("role_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "user_role_assignments" (
  "assignment_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each assignment */,
  "user_id" INTEGER /* ID of the user assigned to a role */,
  "role_id" INTEGER /* ID of the role assigned to the user */,
  "assigned_by" INTEGER /* ID of the user who assigned the role */,
  "assigned_at" TEXT /* Timestamp when the role was assigned */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("assignment_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_user_role_assignments_user_id FOREIGN KEY ("user_id") REFERENCES users ("user_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_user_role_assignments_role_id FOREIGN KEY ("role_id") REFERENCES user_roles ("role_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_user_role_assignments_assigned_by FOREIGN KEY ("assigned_by") REFERENCES users ("user_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "sessions" (
  "session_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each session */,
  "user_id" INTEGER /* ID of the user for whom the session was created */,
  "token" TEXT /* Session token for authentication */,
  "created_at" TEXT /* Timestamp when the session was created */,
  "expires_at" TEXT /* Timestamp when the session expires */,
  "device_info" TEXT /* Information about the device used for the session */,
  "ip_address" TEXT /* IP address for security and analytics */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("session_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_sessions_user_id FOREIGN KEY ("user_id") REFERENCES users ("user_id")
)
